text: The new @Tesla Model 3 is absolutely incredible! The driving experience is so smooth. https://tesla.com/m3 #tesla #ev
Wait times for @Tesla service are getting ridiculous. 3 weeks for a tire rotation? Unacceptable! #teslahelp #badservice
Tesla's contribution to sustainable energy is undeniable, but their build quality still has issues.
Thinking of buying TSLA stock. The brand is strong despite the noise.
Is it just me or does the Cybertruck look like a low-poly video game asset? Still cool though.
Autopilot almost crashed my car today. Never using it again. @Tesla needs to fix this ASAP!
Best car I've ever owned. PERIOD. #TeslaLife
